hooks.prompt: Load business context: read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/data/2-Domaines/business-profile.json if it exists. Use it to initialize Solo session context (language preference, monthly revenue target, services offered).
Run antislop quality check on the output just generated. Check for banned words (delve, tapestry, game-changer, unleash, elevate, demystify, revolutionize, synergy) and rewrite any found.

PostToolUse._note: Central antislop gate. Sales + Copywriter plugins defer to this when Solo is installed.

hooks.command: echo 'Trigger: discovery-synthesizer-agent — synthesize persona, JTBD, journey into go/no-go scorecard'

PostToolUse._note: Auto-synthesizes persona, JTBD, journey → go/no-go scorecard.

hooks.prompt: After the invoice is generated, check ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/data/1-Projets/pipeline.md and update the relevant deal status to 'Invoice Sent' if a matching deal exists.

PostToolUse._note: Moves deal to Invoice Sent in pipeline.md after first invoice.

hooks.command: echo 'Trigger: run reality-checker — validate rate card assumptions against market data'

PostToolUse._note: When Sentinel installed, auto-runs reality-checker after rate card save.

hooks.prompt: After this discovery call completes, synthesize the persona, JTBD, journey, and problem statement into a unified insight report with a go/no-go scorecard. Save to the project directory.
